summary: Well-targeted fix for rate limit exhaustion during rapid market switching. Four complementary changes (debounce, lighter fetch, abort, race guards) address all root causes with good test coverage.

comments.body: Hardcoded `200` duplicates `PERFORMANCE_CONFIG.NavigationParamsDelayMs`. Consider using the named constant to keep them in sync if the intent is the same delay.

The `as Promise<void>` cast is needed because `.then()` returns `void | undefined`. Consider adding an explicit `return undefined as void;` at the end of the `.then()` chain to avoid the cast, or type the map as `Map<string, Promise<void | undefined>>`.

This file is at 3,731 lines — well above the 2,500 line guideline. While this PR only adds ~50 lines, consider planning a split (e.g., extracting market data subscriptions, order book subscriptions, and fills into separate service classes).
